summary: Tested Default Posting Accounts P0 fix. Backend fully working (7/7 pytest passing) - GET/PUT /api/settings/default-accounts persists all 7 account keys correctly. Frontend Settings > Default Accounts tab renders all 7 AccountSelector dropdowns. Pre-fill logic is correctly wired in openCreateForm for SalesInvoice/PurchaseInvoice/SalesReturn/PurchaseReturn. UI end-to-end save+pre-fill could not be fully automated due to selector mismatch (see frontend_issues), but code review confirms correct wiring and backend persistence verified via API.

issues: Hydration warnings in console: <span> cannot be child of <tbody> and <tr> cannot be child of <span>. Caused by a dev instrumentation wrapper (<span data-ve-dynamic>) injected around <tr> rows in DashboardPage (line 723) and SettingsPage users table (line 1215). Not a functional bug but pollutes console.

action_items: TESTABILITY: In /app/frontend/src/components/selectors/AccountSelector.jsx, destructure `data-testid` from props and spread it onto the PopoverTrigger Button so the data-testid values (da-sales, da-purchase, etc.) reach the DOM. Currently the prop is discarded and dropdowns cannot be targeted by testid. Example: accept `'data-testid': testId` in props and add `data-testid={testId}` on the Button.

OPTIONAL: Resolve React hydration warnings about <tr>/<span>/<tbody> nesting caused by dev instrumentation wrappers around table rows in DashboardPage.jsx (line 723) and SettingsPage.jsx (line 1215). Not blocking but noisy.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/settings/default-accounts correctly filters unknown keys and non-string values, enforces super_admin on PUT, returns clean structure on GET. Good implementation.
SettingsPage.jsx: fetchDefaultAccounts/saveDefaultAccounts correctly use relative /accounts URL in AccountSelector (double-URL bug already fixed), and use auth token properly.
SalesInvoicePage.jsx line 270 pre-fills credit_account_id from sales_account - correct (class 7 / revenue).
PurchaseInvoicePage.jsx line 229 pre-fills debit_account_id from purchase_account - correct (class 6 / expense).
SalesReturnPage.jsx line 283 pre-fills debit_account_id from sales_return_account - correct.
PurchaseReturnPage.jsx line 233 pre-fills credit_account_id from purchase_return_account - correct.

AccountSelector.jsx: data-testid prop passed by parent (da-sales, da-sales-vat, etc.) is NOT forwarded to DOM. PopoverTrigger button renders only a hardcoded data-testid='account-selector-trigger'. This blocks parent-specific test-id targeting of individual dropdowns in Default Accounts tab.
AccountSelector uses role='combobox' on trigger button (not role='button'). Document this for future test authors.

success_rate.frontend: Rendering 100% verified; automated save+pre-fill interaction blocked by AccountSelector testability - code-level verification confirms correctness

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 3 accounts (41110001, 41140001, 71010001). Tests save defaults then reset to empty at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend /api/settings/default-accounts is verified (GET returns {organization_id, accounts}, PUT persists; super_admin enforced). Matar Est org has only 3 accounts (class 4 & 7) — no class-6 purchase account exists so Purchase Invoice pre-fill cannot be end-to-end verified without seeding. AccountSelector component in /app/frontend/src/components/selectors/AccountSelector.jsx discards the data-testid prop (no forwarding) and uses role='combobox'. Use get_by_role('combobox', name='Select Sales Account...') or add forwarding of data-testid to the Button inside AccountSelector for reliable Playwright targeting. Pre-fill logic is correctly wired in all 4 invoice/return page openCreateForm handlers.
